$schema: Quarterly OKRs — 3-5 objectives, 3-5 key results each, graded 0.0-1.0

grading_rubric.0.3: Partial progress — under half the target
grading_rubric.0.7: Stretch achieved — the right target for stretch goals
grading_rubric.1.0: Fully achieved or exceeded — sandbagging warning if too many at 1.0

objectives.objective: Convert King Fahad Schools from pilot to first paying customer
objectives.rationale: North-star advance from 0 to 1. Unblocks the default-alive path.

key_results.result: Hold a conversion conversation with Ahmed Baha by 2026-06-15
Hogwarts admission flow at 33/33 tests pass
Submit a formal proposal to King Fahad Schools
First paid invoice generated and paid

objectives.objective: Ship the Kun captain operating system — identity, state, cadence
objectives.rationale: Make the captain a real CEO brain with persistent memory. Multiplies founder leverage.

key_results.result: Phase A complete — CONSTITUTION.md, PRINCIPLES.md, NORTH-STAR.md, all state files, captain.md refactored, /captain global skill
Captain runs at least 3 weekly reviews using new state files (archive in weekly/)
First monthly review run (rolls weekly archives + revenue + risk-delta)

objectives.objective: Build customer-development discipline — at least one new prospect per week in pipeline
objectives.rationale: Default-dead won't change without new prospects. Ali's outreach needs structure.

key_results.result: 5+ named prospects in pipeline.json by end of quarter
≥1 customer interview per week (8 total in Q2)
